coupon.source_phrase_block: Admits 50% off up to 4 ferry tickets from Boston to Spectacle Island and Georges Island, or from Hingham to Peddocks Island. This is a SEASONAL pass available mid-May through early October. Please CHECK SCHEDULE on website before booking. Not all islands are open every day. Specific dates and islands for the current 2026 season are at https://www.bostonharborislands.org/ferryschedule/
